title: Gootasdff — English Class To-Do (New Year's, Satirical Poem, Modest Proposal, Parody)
html:
January 2021 high-school English-class catch-up doc — typo-titled "Gootasdff." Lists four assignments still owed (New Year's resolution stations, satirical poem, "Your Modest Proposal," and the skipped Irony assignment) plus the completed Parody assignment analyzing Weird Al Yankovic's "Smells Like Nirvana" parody of Nirvana's "Smells Like Teen Spirit."

TL;DR

  • Senior-year Grants Pass HS English assignment dump — Yahir owes a New Year's stations piece, a satirical poem, a Jonathan-Swift-style "Modest Proposal," and skipped the Irony text-box.
  • Completed Parody assignment is a media-analysis of Weird Al's "Smells Like Nirvana" — Yahir argues Yankovic's parody works because it's "subtle and unintrusive" and the actors look enough like kurt cobain to almost pass as the real video.
  • Sits inside the same January-2021 burst as the OSU app and Renaissance Scholarship essays — Yahir's plate is full and English homework is the lowest-priority surface.

grants pass high school · weird al yankovic · nirvana band · kurt cobain · scholarship essay cycle
